wsc-frankenphp-utils.title: WSC FrankenPHP Utils
wsc-frankenphp-utils.description: FrankenPHP worker management and cache control
wsc-frankenphp-utils.info: This plugin automates FrankenPHP worker restarts on plugin events (install, update, activate, deactivate, uninstall). Both actions always delete the entire var/cache directory, run cache:warmup and clear OPcache – equivalent to a full container restart.

actions.restartHint: Deletes the entire var/cache directory (including compiled container), runs cache:warmup, clears OPcache and gracefully restarts all FrankenPHP workers. Equivalent to a full container restart.
actions.fullDeployHint: Same as "Restart Workers" – additionally runs bin/console theme:compile beforehand. Useful after theme changes.

status.empty: No action has been logged by this plugin yet.

notifications.restartSuccess: var/cache cleared, OPcache reset and workers restarted successfully
notifications.restartError: Error restarting workers – check log for details
notifications.fullDeployError: Full deploy completed with errors – check log for details
